channel.title: Download free software, update daily!
channel.description: Taiwebs.com - Download free software applications, full version, latest updates!

item.title: Download Lightmap HDR Light Studio 9.4.0.2026.0331
item.description: HDR Light Studio software gives 3D artists a new way to illuminate 3D images. Adorn your photos with lights. Lighting process is now easy, fast, accurate, creative and fun. HDR Light Studio builds the lighting used by your existing 3D rendering software and renderers. By adding HDR Light Studio, 3D artists become more productive and image quality improves. When combining photography and CG images, combining light between the image content and CG elements is the key to a successful and...

item.title: Download Syncovery Premium 11.14.4.185

The software comes with support for FTP and secure FTP servers, SSH, WebDAV, Amazon S3, http, update the part file, ZIP compression, data encryption, and schedule automatic backups. Syncovery Pro Enterprise have the ability to freely select files and folders across the whole folder hierarchy in tree view and supports email...

item.title: Download WavePad 24.12
item.description: WavePad is the sound editor allows you to create and edit recordings and audio files, supports a number of file formats including wav, mp3, vox, gsm, real audio, au, aif and more. It allows you to cut, copy and paste parts of recording and optionally apply effects like echo, amplification and noise reduction. In addition, you can insert silence, fade in / out, auto-trim and more. WavePad supports sample rates from 6000 to 96000Hz, stereo or mono, 8, 16, or 32 bits. The program also...

item.title: Download eDocPrinter PDF Pro 11.10 Build 11108
item.description: eDocPrinter PDF Pro is an application to create PDF files from applications in Windows 2000, Windows XP and above. eDocPrinter PDF Pro works as a printer under windows environment, hence users can print from any application window using the device printing GDI. Extremely easy to work with this tool, because it installs on your system as a virtual printer and lets you convert documents to PDF in an easy way. eDocPrinter PDF Pro comes with advanced functions that can meet the requirements of...

FocusMe blocks distractions, reveals your online habits, and helps you build deeply productive work habits. How FocusMe works: In a world of highly addictive websites and apps, FocusMe studies your digital patterns and reveals your online behavior. Where your attention is scattered, when you're most productive, and what needs stricter boundaries. The AI ​​coach is an optional...

You can choose to sort their notes into categories, password protect them, export them to XML and more. item.title: Download NetSpeedTray 1.3.0 + Portable
item.description: NetSpeedTray is a lightweight, open source network monitor for Windows that displays upload/download speeds directly on the Taskbar with a native look and feel. Designed to blend seamlessly with Windows 10/11 user interface. Includes intelligent detection of light and dark themes on the taskbar to ensure text is always visible. Sits quietly in the system tray without hogging resources. Features "Dynamic Update Rate" that automatically reduces update frequency when the network is idle to...

item.title: Download VovSoft Bulk QR Code Generator 2.6
item.description: QR Code are commonly used to contain data for locators, identifiers, or trackers that point to a web page. QR Code stores data efficiently by supporting different encoding modes such as numeric, alphanumeric, byte, binary. Generating thousands of QR Code with different data individually can be time consuming. But with VovSoft Bulk QR Code Generator, you can generate QR Code containing different plain texts at the same time by generating QR Code in bulk. Although there are various online...

item.title: Download WinPE 11-10-8 Sergei Strelec 2026.04.14
item.description: WinPE 11-10-8 Sergei Strelec is a Windows 11, 10 and 8 PE boot disk for computer maintenance, hard disks and partitions, disk and partition backup and restore, computer diagnostics, data recovery, installation Windows. Assembly components include: WinPE 11 x64 WinPE 10 x64 WinPE 10 x86 WinPE 8 x86 WinPE 8 x86 (Native) System Requirements: 1. RAM 1 GB or more 2. PC can boot from CD/DVD or USB drive.
